languages.text: "Не расстраивайтесь, шерин! Мы все почистим и отмоем! Ваш Патент будет как новенький — я знаю пару реставраторов... писарей? Археологов?" {n}Джай тихо ругается, когда под ее сапожком хрустит край священной бумаги.{/n}

"Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Не расстраивайтесь, шерин! Мы все почистим и отмоем! Ваш Патент будет как новенький — я знаю пару реставраторов... писарей? Археологов?" {n}Джай тихо ругается, когда под ее сапожком хрустит край священной бумаги.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}

"Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}

"Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}

languages.text: 「諦めないで、シェリーン！全部片付けよう！あなたの証書は新品同様になるわ。修復してくれる人を知ってるわ...修復師？書記？考古学者？」{n}ジャエは聖なる紙の端が彼女の靴で破れるのを静かに呪う.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「諦めないで、シェリーン！全部片付けよう！あなたの証書は新品同様になるわ。修復してくれる人を知ってるわ...修復師？書記？考古学者？」{n}ジャエは聖なる紙の端が彼女の靴で破れるのを静かに呪う.{/n}

languages.text: «¡No desespere, shereen! ¡Lo limpiaremos todo! La Patente quedará como nueva. Conozco a unos restauradores... ¿Escribas? ¿Arqueólogos?». {n}Jae maldice en voz baja cuando el borde del sagrado papel cruje bajo su bota.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡No desespere, shereen! ¡Lo limpiaremos todo! La Patente quedará como nueva. Conozco a unos restauradores... ¿Escribas? ¿Arqueólogos?». {n}Jae maldice en voz baja cuando el borde del sagrado papel cruje bajo su bota.{/n}

languages.text: "Verzweifelt nicht, Shereen! Das kriegen wir schon hin. Euer Handelsbrief wird so gut wie neu sein ... ich kenne einige Restauratoren ... Schreiber? Archäologen?" {n}Jae flucht leise, als der Rand des heiligen Dokuments unter ihrem Stiefel knirscht.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Verzweifelt nicht, Shereen! Das kriegen wir schon hin. Euer Handelsbrief wird so gut wie neu sein ... ich kenne einige Restauratoren ... Schreiber? Archäologen?" {n}Jae flucht leise, als der Rand des heiligen Dokuments unter ihrem Stiefel knirscht.{/n}

languages.text: « Ne vous inquiétez pas, shereen, On va nettoyer tout ça ! Votre lettre de marque sera aussi belle qu'au premier jour. Je connais quelques bons restaurateurs... et scribes ? Archéologues ? » {n}Jae laisse échapper quelques injures en entendant le papier crisser sous ses bottes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ne vous inquiétez pas, shereen, On va nettoyer tout ça ! Votre lettre de marque sera aussi belle qu'au premier jour. Je connais quelques bons restaurateurs... et scribes ? Archéologues ? » {n}Jae laisse échapper quelques injures en entendant le papier crisser sous ses bottes.{/n}

languages.text: “不要绝望，亲爱的！我们会收拾干净的！你的贸易授状会完好如新——我认识几个修复师……呃，抄写员？考古学家？”{n}婕伊轻声咒骂了一句，她的靴子把神圣纸张的边缘踩得嘎吱作响。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}

languages.text: "Umutsuzluğa kapılma şirinim! Hepsini temizleriz! Ruhsatname eskisi gibi olur. Tanıdığım birkaç restoratör, kâtip, arkeolog falan var." {n}Jae, kutsal kâğıdın kenarı çizmesi altında ezilirken sessizce küfrediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't despair, shereen! We'll clean it all up! Your Warrant will be as good as new — I know a couple of restorers... scribes? Archaeologists?" {n}Jae curses quietly as the edge of the sacred paper crunches under her boot.{/n}
